20,314 phone numbers from "https://laylo.com"
Found using google dork + browser extension combo
Found AWS bucket with listing enabled
Found ".vcf" files that contained PII

20,314 phone numbers from "https://laylo.com"
Found using google dork + browser extension combo
Found open AWS bucket with listing enabled
Found ".vcf" files that contain PII

Including with but not limited to:
Sabrina Carpenter, Skrillex, Billie Eilish,
Nicki Minaj, Ariana Grande ....etc

This data breach is against the official Laylo policy:
Privacy and GDPR Policy

Using my social network I've shared this website to the world.

Thanks to: Sun, Sg, Our Berg Life, Jolieixic and People At The Airport.

Anyone who is a Hacker or not,
I love you and wish the best for you.

Laylo, your HACKED.

Visit this website on a laptop/computer/PC/monitor and press "CTRL" + "F" / CTRL + F / "CRTL" + "F" / crtl

And use that as a search through the list of 20,000 leaked phone numbers and the famous artists/singers you want to find their number. Read the two blocks of text on the top and bottom right corners of the screen.

SCROLL DOWN! ↓

Laylo, your HACKED.

Visit this website on a laptop / computer / PC / monitor and press "CTRL" + "F"
